title: New Rise Begins Commercial SAF Production and Secures First Order
content: XCF Global Capital, Inc., a key player in decarbonizing the aviation industry through Sustainable Aviation Fuel (â€œSAFâ€), today announced the commencement of commercial production of neat SAF at New Rise Renewables, LLC (â€œNew Riseâ€). In addition, New Rise has entered into an irrevocable corporate purchase order (â€œICPOâ€) for the sale of over 3 million gallons of neat SAF with an unaffiliated thirdparty buyer. The first shipments of neat SAF are expected to begin in February 2025, with delivery anticipated to begin in early March.
author: Analysts Account
